item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested next confirmation person, names the prior human-gate pattern (door watch, manual check, ledger recheck), frames the recurring issue as upstream process-control failure rather than a missing person, and redirects to owner-led consolidation/structural control redesign. It does not supply the requested local manual gate."}
